command.description: The value for the key command must be set_region

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

country.description: Country name. Valid values can be retrieved from GET /cloud/supportedRegionList.

standardname.description: Regulatory standard name for the chosen country. Valid values can be retrieved from GET /cloud/supportedStandardList?region=<country>.

isLBT.description: Optional. Enables Listen-Before-Talk when supported by the selected standard.

channeldata.description: Optional channel frequency list (kHz) to apply when channel selection is supported by the selected standard.
